## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Katherine Hutter for an Account Executive role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Relevant Experience:** Katherine Hutter has a strong background selling analytics tools (Hotjar, ContentSquare) to marketing and product leaders, including building out a sales-assisted PLG motion to upsell users from free plans.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [**Strategic Outbound:** Her outbound strategy focuses on warm leads with clear rationale for a meeting, such as competitor partners or existing users within larger organizations.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [**Major Deal Strategy:** For large deals (e.g., Blackhawk Network), she consolidates disparate accounts into enterprise contracts by building unbranded business cases using the prospect's own language.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Vision:** GrowthX is evolving from a services firm to a product company, building software (e.g., Check That) based on its own operational expertise to ensure product-market fit.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2752.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background & Experience

  - [**Career Path:** SDR → Channel Sales → Hotjar (New Business, Expansion, Agency Partners) → ContentSquare (post-acquisition).](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Hotjar Sales Motion:** Built a sales-assisted PLG process to upsell users from free plans.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [**Problem:** Users self-served to the lowest-tier plan (500 sessions/day), which sampled traffic and provided incomplete data.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
      - [**Solution:** Used product analytics to identify high-potential accounts (e.g., 10k+ sessions/day) and pitched the value of "100% capture" for accurate decision-making.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [**Acquisition Experience:** Navigated the integration of Hotjar and Heap Analytics into ContentSquare, managing the transition from startup to enterprise.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Product Positioning & Differentiation

  - [**Value Prop:** Traditional analytics (e.g., GA4) show *what* happened; ContentSquare/Hotjar shows *why* by visualizing user behavior (heatmaps, session recordings).](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Key Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
      - [**Ease of Use:** Simple, one-tag installation for immediate insights.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
      - [**Transparency:** Public pricing and a free trial contrast with competitors' gated models.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [**Security:** Positioned as a European company with robust data protection.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [**Competitors:** Amplitude, PostHog, Adobe Analytics, Full Story.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

### Major Deal Example: Blackhawk Network

  - [**Context:** Consolidated disparate, credit-card-paid accounts into a single enterprise contract.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [**Pain Point:** Teams were getting negative survey feedback but lacked full data capture to analyze the user sessions and diagnose the root cause.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [**Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
      - [**Business Case:** Built an unbranded document using the prospect's own language to help them champion the deal internally.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
      - [**Relationship Building:** Built trust with the economic buyer (Yulia) by being highly responsive and reliable, acting as a partner.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2029.0)
  - [**Self-Assessment:** Rated the deal a "7/10."](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2280.0)
      - [**Strengths:** Persistence, scoping disparate teams into one contract.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
      - [**Areas for Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2134.0)
          - [**Internal Support:** Could have built more support with regional leads to increase deal scope.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2174.0)
          - [**Cross-selling:** Missed opportunities to position other ContentSquare solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2357.0)

### GrowthX: Business Model & Sales Process

  - [**Business Model:** Evolving from a services firm to a product company.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2752.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Build software based on proven operational expertise to ensure product-market fit.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2752.0)
  - [**Services Sales Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2595.0)
      - [**Phases:** Discovery → Demo → Partnership Doc → Review Content Plan.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2595.0)
      - [**Pricing:** Phase 2 starts at $180k/year.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2670.0)
      - [**Structure:** A two-phase model allows clients to opt out after Phase 1, enabling a faster initial sale.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2666.0)
  - [**Product Sales:**](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2715.0)
      - [**"Check That":** AI visibility and monitoring platform ($18k/year).](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2715.0)
      - [**Future Vision:** Open internal content creation tools to clients in 3–4 months.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Share interview recording with the VP of Operations for review.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2945.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Follow up with Katherine Hutter on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/6TPkkrzV66xQndXDTt_UWSKsVjA1VFhh?tab=summary&timestamp=2945.0)
